headline: Trump 🍊🔥 Slams 'Unpatriot' House Cucks 🏛️💦 Over Iran War Powers 🔥🛑
text:
Trump 🍊👑 just went full NUCLEAR ☢️💥 on House 🏛️ 'DUMOCRATS' 🤡 and 4 'GRANDSTANDING' GOP RINOS 🐘💦 who voted 215-208 to LIMIT his WAR POWERS ⚔️🛑 mid-Iran negotiations 🤝🏜️! He called it a 'MEANINGLESS' 🗑️ vote and straight-up UNPATRIOTIC 🇺🇸🚫, claiming the Dems are powered by TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME 😵‍💫🤪 and would rather see the COUNTRY FAIL 📉 than hand him another VICTORY 🏆! The four GOP rebels — Massie, Fitzpatrick, Barrett & Davidson — got dragged as ASHAMED GRANDSTANDERS 😤👀 who should HIDE THEIR FACES 🙈💦!

The House passed a War Powers Resolution that would FORCE Trump to PULL US FORCES or get CONGRESS APPROVAL after 60 days ⏰🚫 — but the White House called it UNCONSTITUTIONAL 🚨⚖️ and basically SYMBOLIC 🎭! Even if the GOP Senate tweaks it to a joint resolution, Trump would VETO it ✍️🚫 and Congress lacks the votes to OVERRIDE 🗳️💀. Still, the vote sent a BLUNT MESSAGE 📣: 'We really, really, really think this is UNLAWFUL and you need to GET OUT' — said law prof Glennon 🧑‍⚖️!

Meanwhile, petrol prices are SPIKING ⛽📈, 64% of voters think Trump was WRONG to hit Iran, and even 73% of INDEPENDENTS oppose the war 🗳️😡! The vote also exposed GOP CRACKS 🪨 — just days after conservatives blocked Trump's $1.8B 'anti-weaponization' slush fund for political ALLIES 🤑💼. Dem Jared Golden flipped to YES ✅ this time, and Barrett shrugged off TRUMP RETRIBUTION fears, saying he votes his CONSCIENCE 🧠💯!

This is the FOURTH House attempt to REIN IN Trump’s war powers, but the road to enforcement is a THORNY MAZE 🌀 of politics, procedure, and lawsuits ⚖️🏛️. Still, the pressure is MOUNTING like a bad Tinder date 📈😬 — Trump’s final Iran peace talks are now happening under the shadow of this Capitol CAP 🧢💦!
